texto: What was he like afterwards?Totally adorable-he fell asleep right on top of me!What was he like afterwards?I thought he'd died. No, Really! He fell asleep-I had to roll him off of me so i could breathe
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Pat Brisson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “What was he like afterwards?Totally adorable-he fell asleep right on top of me!What was he like a…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, molly-biden, sex pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de molly-biden e sex.
